blocks.content: Bawio attempted a technique.

blocks.speaker: Bawio
blocks.content: Arrogant brat…!
He tried to disrupt Rian's balance by entwining his arms around him.
However, Rian also swung his arms to block the move.
Annoyed, Bawio pushed Rian.
Then he collided with him again.
With a bang, the second headbutt landed.
This time, Rian also felt dizzy.
Finally, seeing an opportunity for a tackle, Bawio rushed at Rian, wrapping his arms around his waist.
As Rian staggered back, Bawio hooked his leg, opening up his waist.
If he could slam him down now, it would be over.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Ugh!
Rian barely twisted his body to escape.
He still wasn't fully conscious.
He needed time.
But Bawio didn't give him a chance to recover and charged again.
Having been thwarted twice, Rian instinctively countered by thrusting his head forward.
His mind flashed, but it wasn't as bad as the first and second times.
The two stood with their foreheads pressed together, glaring at each other.
Blood was flowing from both their noses.
Bawio couldn't contain his anger.
For someone aspiring to be a heavy infantryman, strength was as important as swordsmanship.
The fact that Rian had pushed him this far, despite never losing in wrestling before, raised Rian's value.

blocks.speaker: Bawio
blocks.content: Hmph. I can't let it end like this.
Bawio smirked and said, 'You're holding up pretty well. But are you okay? You look dazed.'
In reality, Rian was dazed.
In a strength contest, you had to match your breathing to your opponent's reactions.
It was like a contest to see who could hold their breath the longest underwater.
With a lack of oxygen, even standing made him feel faint.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Then let's start folding.
Rian ground his teeth.
Had Bawio been fighting without using folding all this time?
As if to prove he wasn't lying, immense power emanated from Bawio's body.

blocks.speaker: Bawio
blocks.content: Hahaha! This is too easy!
Bawio toyed with Rian at will.
He lifted and dropped him, swung him left and right like playing with a child.
With more than double the strength difference, techniques were useless.

blocks.speaker: Bawio
blocks.content: You didn't think I'd end it like this, did you?
Bawio hugged Rian's chest and lifted him.
As he applied pressure, all the air was forced out of Rian's lungs.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Ugh!
The feeling of having the air forcibly expelled from his body was the height of discomfort, but it was nothing compared to what followed.
Bawio lifted Rian's arm and slipped it under his armpit, attempting an abdominal stretch while standing.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: What, what is that…?
The cadets looked on in astonishment.
It was an abdominal stretch, also known as a cobra twist.
It was a legitimate wrestling move, but successfully applying it to a standing opponent was difficult, usually practiced as a joke or for training unless there was a significant skill gap.
And this was exactly what Bawio was aiming for.
Rian was caught in the move, his side twisted and his arm lifted.
It looked ridiculous, but it was a position where he couldn't exert any strength, making it impossible to escape once caught.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Ugh!
A groan escaped Rian's mouth.
His muscles were stretched to their limits, and even a slight movement from Bawio sent pain shooting up his spine.
Bawio turned his body to show off Rian's predicament to the cadets.
It was humiliating, but he had no choice but to be dragged along.

blocks.speaker: Bawio
blocks.content: How about I break your back like this? Huh?
Every slight movement from Bawio made Rian's spine creak.
Satisfied, Bawio turned to Tess.
He saw her biting her lip and trembling.

blocks.speaker: Bawio
blocks.content: I told you not to underestimate me.

blocks.speaker: Bawio
blocks.content: Why don't you surrender now? Or should we play a bit more?

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Break it.

blocks.speaker: Bawio
blocks.content: What?
Tess looked like she was about to burst into tears.
She was a righteous person.
Therefore, the most frustrated person here was not Rian, but Tess.

blocks.speaker: Bawio
blocks.content: Hahaha! Why are you always so serious? This is just an evaluation. There's no need to go all out. Besides, this won't erase your shame.
Bawio dragged Rian around again.
He could feel the emotions of the cadets.
Some were fearful, some were angry, some were sympathetic.
But he knew these were the gazes of the weak looking at the strong.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: What the…?
At that moment, a powerful force was transmitted.

blocks.speaker: Bawio
blocks.content: He still has strength left?
Rian's face didn't show any strain.
His eyes were cold and lifeless, as if time had stopped.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Straighten your back. Straighten your back. Straighten your back.
Rian's gaze was inward.
As the command to straighten his back was delivered, his side began to rise slowly, as if by magic.

blocks.speaker: Bawio
blocks.content: Huh. Look at this guy.

blocks.speaker: Bawio
blocks.content: What is this? Why is this happening?

blocks.speaker: Bawio
blocks.content: Huuuuup!
And the moment he felt the response, his heart sank.
It wasn't a mistake or complacency.
Rian's upper body continued to rise, and he couldn't stop it.

blocks.speaker: Bawio
blocks.content: This is impossible. How is this happening? What is moving him?
Rian wasn't in a position to exert strength.
Yet he was defying the principles of leverage and standing up.
Therefore, it wasn't strength moving him.
Some rule of the world was lifting him.

blocks.speaker: Bawio
blocks.content: Hey, wait! Stop!
Finally, a desperate voice escaped Bawio's mouth.
No matter how much strength he used, he was endlessly being pushed back.
As Rian's posture returned, Bawio's body twisted grotesquely.
Finally, the cobra twist was reversed, and his muscles stretched to their limits.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Aaaargh!
The cadets were stunned as the victim screamed.
Rian neither vented his anger nor mocked Bawio.
He was solely focused on moving his body.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Surrender! I lost! Please stop! Not my back!
Rian didn't stop.
He hadn't been angry when Bawio performed his mocking act.
He had long discarded shame in the face of his lack of talent.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Yes. This will do.
Rian finally made his decision.
He pressed Bawio's face down with his armpit.
There was a cracking sound as something twisted.

blocks.speaker: Bawio
blocks.content: Aaaargh!
Bawio screamed as if his jaw was dislocated.
With their bodies entangled, he couldn't even fall.
As his abdominal muscles tore, all strength left his body, and he hung limp like a puppet with its strings cut, drooling.
Rian grabbed Bawio's head under his armpit and pushed him away.
Bawio twisted in pain from the second impact as he hit the ground.
Tears streamed down his face from the pain.
In the prolonged silence, the cadets' gazes changed.
The image of the absolute strongman they had seen in Bawio earlier was gone.

blocks.speaker: Bawio
blocks.content: Poor guy. He was supposed to go on vacation today, but now he'll be recovering for three months.
Bawio propped himself up with his hands.
But he screamed and fell again from the pain.

blocks.speaker: Bawio
blocks.content: Don't think this changes anything! I'm just weak! You're not strong!
Bawio's venomous words, even as he belittled himself, showed his malice.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: That bastard…!
Tess clenched her fists.
If it weren't for the evaluation, she would have run over and punched his torn abdomen.
Meanwhile, Rian remained calm.
He returned to his seat and draped his training uniform over his shoulder.
Without a word, he turned and walked towards the exit of the training ground.

blocks.speaker: Bawio
blocks.content: R-Rian?
Tess and the other cadets looked at Rian in shock.
Kuan's cold voice pierced his back.

blocks.speaker: Kuan
blocks.content: Rian. Sit down. Leaving without permission is a fail.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Then fail me.
Rian couldn't see any difference between last place and failing.
No matter what achievements he showed, the school wouldn't give points to a swordsman who couldn't use Schema.
As Rian left the training ground, the atmosphere turned cold.
No cadet had ever defied Instructor Kuan like that, and some were already praying for Rian's soul.

blocks.speaker: Kuan
blocks.content: Is this the limit?
Kuan wasn't displeased, nor was he worried about Rian.
As long as he took responsibility for his actions, he didn't care if the cadets ruined their lives.
But today, he didn't feel light-hearted.
Divine Transcendence was a real power, and Rian could wield it.
How long could he endure?
One day, his body would fail to withstand the power of his will and break.
Kuan wrote 'fail' on Rian's evaluation sheet and added 'unauthorized departure' in parentheses.
After the wrestling evaluation ended, Tess went to find Rian without even taking time to wash up.
Just then, Rian came out of the dormitory.
Despite the turmoil inside him, he looked neat, as if he had even taken a shower.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Rian! What happened? Do you really want to fail?

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: I don't care. Whether they mark me or not.
Tess understood Rian's frustration at not being rewarded for his efforts, but this time the situation was really bad.
Defying a superior was never acceptable.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Rian, think again. You've endured well so far.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: It's not because I can't endure. I'm just sick of it.
Seeing Rian's twisted face, Tess realized he was serious.
But what could be done now?
Everything was happening too quickly.
Rian arrived at the instructor's office.
When he entered, Kuan was sorting evaluation sheets.
Glancing at Rian's salute, Kuan turned his gaze back to his desk, uninterested.

blocks.speaker: Kuan
blocks.content: What is it? You left so abruptly.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: I have something to say.

blocks.speaker: Kuan
blocks.content: Go back. You failed. A cadet who acts on their own isn't worth evaluating.
Rian placed an envelope on the desk.
Seeing the writing on it, Kuan frowned and looked up.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: It's a resignation letter. I'm leaving the swordsmanship school.
